h1. Deployment

{info:title=Documentation Metadata}
Purpose: Deployment process, prerequisites, and rollout guidance.\\
Source file: {code}DEPLOYMENT.md{code}\\
Generated (UTC): 2026-02-25 15:51:58Z
{info}

h2. Content

h2. Quick Start

{code:language=bash}
# 1. Generate secrets
./scripts/generate-secrets.sh

# 2. Setup SSL
./scripts/setup-ssl.sh

# 3. Configure .env
vim .env  # Add MISP and CrowdSec credentials

# 4. Start services
docker-compose up -d

# 5. Verify
curl -k https://localhost:7003/health
{code}

h2. Production Deployment

h3. Prerequisites
* Docker 24.0+
* 4GB RAM minimum
* Valid SSL certificate
* External IP/domain name

h3. Steps
# Clone repository
# Configure environment variables
# Setup SSL with Let's Encrypt
# Start services
# Configure firewall (allow 7003/tcp)
# Setup monitoring

h3. Monitoring
* Health: https://your-domain:7003/health
* Logs: docker-compose logs -f
* Stats: https://your-domain:7003/api/stats

h3. Backup
{code:language=bash}
# Backup database
docker-compose exec db pg_dump -U threatfeed threatfeed > backup.sql

# Backup .env
cp .env .env.backup
{code}

h3. Updates
{code:language=bash}
git pull
docker-compose build
docker-compose up -d
{code}
